title: Praxis (Role-based agent runtime)
summary: Praxis is a framework for role-based agents that grow within a defined role, with Quant Cloud inference built in.
content: Deploys the Praxis dashboard backed by Quant Cloud inference. Each Quant application hosts one role: the operator visits /setup on first boot to seed the persona, then operates the role through /chat. Role files persist on an EFS-backed volume mounted at /role; every persona edit and chat-side tool call lands as a git commit on that volume so the audit trail survives redeploys.
